text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While talking with Nice Nature and King Halo
before training gets underway...

text_block_list.name: Underclassman
text_block_list.text: Um, King! I watched your race the other day!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh, is that so?

text_block_list.name: Underclassman
text_block_list.text:
You were so awesome out there that I got shivers!
You were just like a king—like the hero of a story!
I hope someday I can run as well as you!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! It appears my first-rate running has
motivated you! Very well, I shall grant you the
right to race with fiery passion!

text_block_list.name: Underclassman
text_block_list.text:
M-me?! N-no way! I couldn't! My class is having a
race soon, but I'd rather just cheer everyone else
on from the sidelines...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...I don't know what it is, but I feel a really strong
sense of affinity with you. It's almost like I've felt
the same way myself before.

text_block_list.name: Underclassman
text_block_list.text:
Don't be silly! I practically idolize you, Nature! I'm
like the backup for the backup—there's no way
we're alike!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Really, now. How can you be so defeatist after
witnessing my running?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
So be it. In that case, we'll come to your race and
cheer you on.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Did you just way "we"? Are you trying to
rope me into this too?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the underclassman's race, and I've
come to the training track with Nice Nature.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hey ho. So you're already here, huh.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: And you're late. Hurry up, it's just about to start.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The moment the gates flip open, racers clad in
tracksuits burst forth. But it looks like the runner
we're here to support is getting off to a slow start.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When the racers hit the final stretch, she's
positioned a little behind the pack. Standard
tactics dictate that now would be the time to
make a final push.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...It'll be tough for her to break into the lead. She
might even be lagging farther back...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Give it your all!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Whoa?! You okay there, King?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: It's up to you to decide who seizes the lead role! Measure up to yourself, not those around you!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Are you going to let the old you hold you back?
You've trained so hard for this, haven't you?
Show us the new you!

text_block_list.name: Underclassman
text_block_list.text: King! I...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, she's picking up speed! Where's all that
strength coming from?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
(Do King's cheers have this much power? It's not
that she's in the stands because she's in a
supporting role... It's that King can take the lead
role even from the stands...)

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
(So what am I? I'm watching from the stands, so
does that make me a supporting character? Ahh,
King really is a bona fide star...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Urged on by King Halo's cheers, the
underclassman suddenly charges through to the
front of the pack.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: (She's practically shining.)

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
What's going on here?! It's like I'm the only
supporting character here!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Don't give up!

text_block_list.name: Underclassman
text_block_list.text:
...Um, Nature! Thank you so much for cheering me
on!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hm? No, no, I hardly did anything... Anyway,
congrats on getting first place.

text_block_list.name: Underclassman
text_block_list.text:
But your voice came through loud and clear!
Hearing someone as cool and strong as you
cheering for me, I felt like...

text_block_list.name: Underclassman
text_block_list.text: I felt like I was the star of the race!

text_block_list.name: Underclassman
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll be off now! But thank you for
everything!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Well, she got me there.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I, I'm not blushing! I'm just a little hot from all that
cheering I did... That's all...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...But it feels pretty nice, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It might be subtle, but it looks like cheering for
that Umamusume has had a positive influence on
Nice Nature!
